network_summary: Legacy multi-office dental group founded by Dr. Alan V. Villanueva, DMD (Loyola Dental School; died August 10, 2014). Dr. Villanueva operated at least 7 suburban Chicagoland locations under a set of management-company legal entities (LaGrange Dental Management Inc, Riverside Dental Management Inc, Dental Design Group Inc, AV Dental, Bridgeview Smiles, and others). After his death, his son Jonathan Villanueva (a non-dentist) became the NPPES authorized official and is listed as contact person at LaGrange Dental Management Inc on D&B (business type: Management Services). There is no evidence of any DSO/MSO platform, PE backer, or management-services agreement — the management-company legal entity names appear to be a family naming convention. The Naperville office (Dental Design Group / Smile Designers) appears to have closed and been replaced by Da Vinci Dental at the same address. The remaining two watched-IL GP locations (La Grange Park 60526, North Riverside 60546) appear to be ongoing.
owner_operator_identity: Jonathan Villanueva (son, non-dentist administrator/AO); founding clinician Dr. Alan V. Villanueva, DMD (deceased August 10, 2014, Naperville IL; Loyola Dental School graduate; survived by wife Marilyn nee Suacillo and children Jonathan, Jasmine, and Justin Villanueva)
durable_artifacts: Dr. Alan V. Villanueva DMD WebMD profile links all 3 watched-IL NPIs (LaGrange Dental Management, Riverside Dental Management, Dental Design Group) plus 4 additional IL locations to a single dentist
Jonathan Villanueva listed as contact at LaGrange Dental Management Inc (D&B; business type: Management Services; founded 2009; 342 Sherwood Rd, La Grange Park IL 60526)
Obituary (Chicago Tribune / Daily Herald, August 2014): Jonathan Villanueva named as surviving child of Dr. Alan V. Villanueva, DMD — confirms family identity of AO
Dental Design Group NPI 1790998748 at 1000 E Ogden Ave Naperville: Smile Designers (consumer DBA) shown CLOSED on Yelp (updated May 2025); Da Vinci Dental now at same address
Riverside Dental Management WebMD lists Dr. Alan V Villanueva as practitioner alongside Dr. Raghian Ardeshir and Dr. Vlad Botezatu
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Dental Design Group Inc (location_id 77357c36224272c8, NPI 1790998748, 1000 E Ogden Ave Naperville 60563): the consumer-facing 'Smile Designers' brand at this address is shown as CLOSED on Yelp (last updated May 2025). Da Vinci Dental now operates at the same address. This NPI should be reviewed for deactivation / duplicate_location reclassification. The AO cluster false-positive risk is low — Jonathan Villanueva is documented family-member administrator, not a billing contact for unrelated practices.
evidence_chain: AO signal: Jonathan Villanueva appears as authorized official on 3 watched-IL GP NPIs across ZIPs 60526, 60546, 60563. Documentary corroboration: (1) D&B lists Jonathan Villanueva as contact at LaGrange Dental Management Inc, business type 'Management Services'; (2) Dr. Alan V. Villanueva's WebMD profile ties all 3 NPIs (plus 4 additional IL locations) to a single dentist identity; (3) August 2014 obituary (Chicago Tribune) names Jonathan Villanueva as a surviving child of Dr. Alan V. Villanueva, DMD, confirming family succession. No DSO/MSO platform, PE sponsor, or management-services agreement found in web searches. The 'Management' suffix in all legal entity names appears to be a family naming convention, not evidence of a separate management/MSO layer.
future_app_notes: 1. Confirm whether NPI 1790998748 (Dental Design Group, Naperville) should be reclassified to duplicate_location or solo_inactive — Smile Designers brand closed per Yelp May 2025, Da Vinci Dental now at same address. 2. The broader Villanueva legacy network includes at least 4 additional non-watched IL addresses (Bloomingdale 120 Ridge Ave, Woodridge 7546 Janes Ave, Chicago 5214 N Western Ave, Bridgeview 8729 S Harlem Ave) — consider whether any fall in watched ZIPs. 3. Justin Villanueva (another son, per obituary) may also be a dentist — search for 'Justin Villanueva DDS Illinois' if network scope needs expansion. 4. No website corroborates a group brand — individual offices may have operated independently under local-name brands.
